name: C-20 consumption trace populates a per-framework freshness state with the §2.17 enum value
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch && printf '2026-05-25T08:00:00Z' > .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch/soc2-tsc.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/consumption-trace.sh" --commit-sha abc --consulted-compliance soc2-tsc --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z --emit trace.json && grep -qE 'fresh-within-fetch-frequency|fresh' trace.json && echo fresh 1>&2
